subject:
Re: All micrographs are filtered out during data source creation
 (1.0.9)
body:
Hi Alexandre,

that is odd indeed. While I'm trying to figure out why this might happen, 
the best way to proceed is to include the blue ones – they won't be 
processed later if there are no particles in them.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Friday, August 28, 2020 at 1:47:38 PM UTC+2 alexandre....@gmail.com 
wrote:

> Hi,
>
> I am trying to create a data source using a Warp session, but all the 
> micrographs are indicated as filtered out after loading the .settings file 
> from Warp. In Warp, only a fraction of the raw data appears blue.
> I am not sure why the mics are not recognized.
>
> Thanks
> Alexandre
>
